overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through a desert wasteland toward the futuristic Night City. The camera follows the car from a third-person perspective as it transitions from a cracked desert road to a multi-lane highway interchange, passing solar farms and power lines with the neon-lit city skyline growing larger in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway with solar energy farms

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the desert road following a silver sedan ahead

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving ahead on the cracked asphalt road

entered.detail: tall metal electricity pylons with multiple power lines running parallel to the road
large array of solar panel structures covering the desert hillside
weathered asphalt road surface with visible cracks and patches
futuristic metropolis with towering skyscrapers visible on the horizon
sparse joshua trees and dry bushes dotting the sandy terrain

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels along a cracked asphalt road through an arid desert landscape. High voltage power lines run parallel on the left while solar panel farms stretch across the right side. A distant futuristic city skyline is visible ahead, and the camera follows a silver sedan driving in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert approach to urban highway interchange

events.description: overtakes a blue car on the left side of the road
red car passes by in the opposite direction on the left
vehicle turns right at intersection onto highway ramp

agents.ego_description: accelerating and overtaking slower vehicles while approaching the highway interchange

notable_agents.action: blue car being overtaken on the left side of the road
red car traveling in the opposite direction passing by quickly

entered.detail: large green directional highway sign indicating routes toward the city
tall advertising billboard with digital display visible beside the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues toward the city, passing other cars on the road. Highway signs and billboards begin to appear on the right side as the solar farms and power lines recede behind. The vehicle overtakes a blue car and is passed by a red car before turning right onto a highway ramp.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane highway interchange with overhead signage

events.description: passes under large overhead highway gantry signs pointing to Night City

agents.ego_description: navigating the curved highway ramp at speed toward the city center

entered.detail: large metal overhead structure supporting highway direction signs
metal safety barriers lining the edge of the elevated highway ramp
red and white striped concrete barriers separating highway lanes

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a multi-lane highway interchange with overhead gantry signs displaying directions to Night City. The road is lined with guardrails and barriers as it curves toward the towering futuristic cityscape, which now dominates the center of the view. The vehicle passes under the large overhead signs as it continues toward the urban center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate desert wasteland toward the towering, neon-lit skyline of a futuristic metropolis. It begins by trailing a silver sedan along a cracked asphalt road, flanked by high-voltage power lines and sprawling solar panel farms under an arid sky. As the vehicle progresses, the industrial landscape recedes and is replaced by highway signs and billboards, with the camera capturing the flow of traffic as the sedan overtakes a blue car and is passed by a red one. The scene then shifts as the vehicle turns onto a highway ramp, entering a complex multi-lane interchange defined by guardrails and massive overhead gantry signs. Finally, the camera glides under these signs as the road curves, leaving the desert behind to face the urban center of Night City which now dominates the horizon.
